text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 14 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
And to this road
I commit my feet
So that i may offer up
My journey to be with God

This path i choose
As a show of love
May be long or never ending
But I
Will never falter from its course
My aim is true
Should it be
That I tire on the way?
Then lord
Please comfort me
With love unbounded
And will gladly follow you
